name: Order lab / bloods
description: Place an order for a laboratory test or panel (e.g. repeat Troponin I, Full Blood Count, U&Es, COVID PCR).

name: Obtain 12-lead ECG
description: Order and record a 12-lead ECG to assess for ischaemic or dynamic changes.

name: Initiate cardiac monitoring
description: Start continuous cardiac (telemetry) monitoring given suspected acute coronary syndrome.

name: Request Cardiology review
description: Request a specialty consult or review (e.g. Cardiology review for a raised troponin / suspected ACS).

name: Administer medication (clinician-gated)
description: Prepare a drug and dose for administration (e.g. aspirin 300 mg loading dose, enoxaparin 1 mg/kg). Every drug and dose is confirmed by the clinician before it is administered.

name: Schedule reassessment / recheck
description: Schedule a clinical reassessment or re-evaluate after intervention (e.g. review the repeat Troponin I once it returns).
